concerns.text: T069a requires sourcing ≥100 summaries with 'at least 20 per domain' but lacks a verification task to confirm the final dataset meets this stratified distribution. This is a critical deliverable requirement.

T017 states 'Handle missing baseline conversion rate…should be flagged in audit notes' but there's no explicit task verifying this flagging actually happens.  A missing flag renders the handling ineffective.
T096 writes checksums to `data/checksums.txt` while T076 writes to `output/checksums.txt`, violating Principle IV (Single Source of Truth). This needs consolidation.
T026 lacks explicit verification that both binary AND continuous outcomes are present in the generated synthetic data, despite FR-030 requiring both.
T020c archives provenance metadata, but no task confirms all required metadata fields (URL, repository identifier, fetch timestamp) are actually captured.
T005 states 'Confirm Constitution Principles I-VII compliance in CI' but only verifies CI compliance (PT005). A full compliance check requires more than just CI passing.
T083 verifies Quickstart execution time but doesn't explicitly confirm it runs on the 'default GitHub Actions runner' as specified.
T026 mentions subgroup analysis by 'domain and year' but doesn't explicitly verify year extraction is implemented.
